categories.title: Category Management
categories.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete category "{name}"?
categories.deleteConfirmDesc: This action cannot be undone. Please confirm there are no associated materials or sub-categories.
categories.hasMaterials: This category has associated materials and cannot be deleted
categories.hasChildren: This category has sub-categories, please delete them first
categories.emptyStateDesc: Click "Add Category" to create the first category
categories.dragHint: Drag to adjust category order and hierarchy
